title: One dashboard pulling from boards in multiple workspaces
excerpt: Is it possible to have one dashboard that has a calendar view from tasks (milestones) from multiple projects across several workspaces? If so, can someone please  explain how to set that up?

posts.author: Kristi (Kristi Fuxan)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to have one dashboard that has a calendar view from tasks (milestones) from multiple projects across several workspaces? If so, can someone please explain how to set that up?

posts.author: MikeB_Axanexa (Mike Buckiewicz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi There!

The requirements for this are as follows:

  1. Make sure you are an owner of each of the boards that you want to pull into the dashboard.
  2. Sometimes, dependent on the security settings, will need to be added ot each workspace as well.
  3. Connect the boards you want from all the workspaces to one dashboard.
  4. Ensure the audience of the dashboard has access to all of the boards connected.

This is how you would set this up at a basic level. If you need more assistance or looking for help in the advance onboarding, please reach out!

https://www.axanexa.com/contact-us/

Talk soon!

Mike B
Automation Architect
